channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Street light on during daylight, 2nd July
item.description:
Lamp post with LED lights is on in full sunlight at 15:00
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hook Lane, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley for 5+ years, 2nd July
item.description:
This (former?) Royal Mail trolley has been here for more than 5 years. It is chained to the fence. It attracts graffiti and rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Evering Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped outside house for weeks, 2nd July
item.description:
Sofa dumped on street for weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blurton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds in kerb, 2nd July
item.description:
It's turning into veritable forest

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barrington Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noticeboard needs to be removed, 2nd July
item.description:
A estste agency, Peddar, has put up a noticeboard by Sydenham Hill Car Park on Lordship Lane . Please remove it .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 565, Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture base left on pavement, 2nd July
item.description:
As per image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches too near the house, 2nd July
item.description:
The tree needs to be pruned, It is getting far too big and wide now. Natural nuisances: Seasonal issues like falling leaves, sap, pollen, bird droppings, or fruit. I really need a free brown bin to collect all of the seasonal issues connected with the tree as there is so much that falls from it. On the pavement outside you can see the roots cracking the pavement towards our house 117 Axminster Crescent and we have a huge crack in our wall. Its a lovely tree but getting far too big now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Axminster Crescent, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street signs names wrong directions, 2nd July
item.description:
Street names showing wrong directions on Southwark St/Canvey St

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Canvey Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water meter cover broken, 2nd July
item.description:
Trip hazard on oavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 359, Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No 7 Acol road, 2nd July
item.description:
The tree root is uplifting part of the driveway path and unaddressed will worsen

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Acol Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 2nd July
item.description:
Possible fox under cardboard near dr surgery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree's, 2nd July
item.description:
Tree's need to be cut back. narrow alley making it hard to get resident cars down the ally.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in private residential development, 2nd July
item.description:
An amount of clothing and personal effects were dumped here yesterday evening (01/07) before 21.45. Documents were discovered which could give an indication about the perpetrators. We have reason to believe these people have been operating in the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Blackthorn Grove, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Brooke Road, 2nd July
item.description:
Bottles and general rubbish building up behind the electrical services cabinets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black coloured graffiti, 2nd July
item.description:
Graffiti on Green dragon court under railway bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Dragon Court, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents fly-tipping front of property, 2nd July
item.description:
Residents fly-tipping front of property - ongoing this location

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hemlock poisonous plant growing, 2nd July
item.description:
Hemlock a very poisonous plant is growing on the border between the pathway and the road. It will flower very soon, and needs to be cut down before the seeds spread.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kinlet Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and rusty handrail between 26 Elmfield Road and the JobCentre, 2nd July
item.description:
The handrail is all rusty and has broken off on the bottom at the top of the stairs. The handrail is loose and it may tip over at anytime posing a H&S issue to people using the stairs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Elmfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Residents fly-tipping front of property - ongoing at this location
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thrale Street, The Borough, Greater London
